title: orthaea glandulifera
intro: Orthaea glandulifera, also known as the "Glandular Orchid", is a plant species native to South America, particularly in the Andean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Orthaea glandulifera include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
